summary: All major and minor findings from round 1 resolved. UNKNOWN state bug fixed and covered by a thorough 3-step state-transition test. Watchdog respawn failure and None-guard tests added. STATE_FILE moved to module-level import. Implementation is correct and test coverage is now adequate for the specified behavior.

suggestions.suggestion: `logger.warning` for transient VPN check errors (e.g. subprocess timeout on Linux/CI) may produce log noise. Consider reverting to `logger.debug` since VPN check errors are not actionable at warning level.
suggestions.benefit: Reduces log noise in non-Windows environments
